# OPENLETZ

> OPENLETZ is a Luxembourg AI agency. We build custom AI agents, chatbots and workflow automation for businesses, plus high-performance Next.js websites, e-commerce and growth marketing — every AI tool vetted for GDPR and the EU AI Act. We also build Web3 (dApps, smart contracts, token-gating) with European hosting when a product genuinely needs it. AI is the core; on-chain follows when it earns its place. Tagline: "Websites that think, move and transact."

OPENLETZ is the trading studio of **Commit Media S.à r.l.** (RCS Luxembourg B276192), founded by **Clément Fermaud**. The founder runs growth and marketing for live AI and Web3 products — including Aleph Cloud — and has personally shipped LibertAI, aleph-fileshare, Gategram and Greg. EU-regulatory credibility (GDPR, EU AI Act) is built into every engagement.

Primary domain: https://openletz.ai
Languages: English (primary), French, German, Luxembourgish (LB).

## What we do (3 pillars)

- [AI — agents, assistants and automation](https://openletz.ai/#ai): RAG chatbots, copilots and AI assistants; workflow automation; AI readiness audits. Builds are designed to be EU AI Act-compliant. From €900. AI projects in Luxembourg may be co-funded up to 50% via Fit 4 AI.
- [Digital and web marketing](https://openletz.ai/#marketing): Next.js websites and e-commerce, SEO + AEO/GEO, content, paid acquisition and analytics. Proof: Vins Fins and La Grocerie. Websites from €900.
- [Web3 — dApps, smart contracts and on-chain](https://openletz.ai/#web3): dApp and smart-contract builds, token-gating and on-chain features, plus European hosting and uptime. Scoped per project.

## Pricing anchors

- [Pricing](https://openletz.ai/#pricing): Website from €900. AI automation from €900. Web3 build scoped per project. Care and hosting from €90/month.

## Shipped work

- [Vins Fins](https://openletz.ai/#work): E-commerce site for a fine-wine merchant (Next.js, Stripe).
- [La Grocerie](https://openletz.ai/#work): E-commerce site sharing stock and checkout infrastructure with Vins Fins.
- [Gategram](https://openletz.ai/#work): Telegram paywall product using Telegram Stars for token-gated access.
- [LibertAI](https://openletz.ai/#work): Private AI assistants and agents (growth, marketing and product contributions).
- [Greg](https://openletz.ai/#work): Intent-based DEX aggregator (Web3 trading application).
- [aleph-fileshare](https://openletz.ai/#work): Encrypted peer-to-peer file sharing built on Aleph Cloud.

## Studio and contact

- [About OPENLETZ](https://openletz.ai/#about): Studio positioning, founder background and how we work.
- [Contact](https://openletz.ai/#contact): Start a project, request a quote or book an intro call.

- Founder: Clément Fermaud.
